commonParams.background: dark or black background, gallery aesthetic
commonParams.lighting: dramatic spotlight or rim lighting, high contrast
commonParams.avoid: no bright commercial lighting, no white backgrounds, no casual snapshots

hero-studio.prompt: Professional interior photography of a dark modern tattoo studio, black walls, framed flash art on the walls, tattoo chair in center, gallery spotlighting, clean and professional, no people, editorial style

tattoo-closeup.prompt: Professional macro photography of a hyper-realistic black and grey tattoo sleeve in progress on skin, tattoo machine in frame, dark background, dramatic lighting showing the detail and shading, editorial

flash-wall.prompt: Professional interior photography of a gallery wall covered in framed tattoo flash art sheets, black frames, white matting, dark wall, gallery spotlighting, minimalist and artistic, no people

artist-portrait.prompt: Professional portrait photography of a tattoo artist at work station, tattoo machine in gloved hand, concentrating, dark studio background, dramatic rim lighting, black and white editorial style

color-tattoo.prompt: Professional macro photography of a vibrant color tattoo of a rose and geometric shapes, rich reds and greens, on skin, dark background, dramatic lighting, editorial quality, artistic

studio-wide.prompt: Professional interior photography of a wide shot of a high-end tattoo studio, multiple stations, black walls, gallery lighting, leather chairs, clean minimal aesthetic, no people, architectural
